title: pityrogramma caudata
intro: Pityrogramma caudata, also known as the walking fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pityrogramma caudata include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to provide relief from these conditions.
